explanation: Bypasses by renaming the executable from 'npc.exe' to 'npctest.exe', which fails the Image|endswith: '\npc.exe' selection. All other detection criteria are also avoided since the executable name doesn't match.

Bypasses by removing the dash prefix from parameters. The detection requires '-server=', '-vkey=', and '-password=' with dashes, but this command uses parameter names without dashes, avoiding the selection_cli_1 criteria.
Bypasses by using a different config file name ('custom.conf' instead of 'npc'), which fails the selection_cli_2 condition that requires '-config=npc'.
Bypasses by using a non-standard config file extension (.ini instead of just 'npc'), avoiding the exact '-config=npc' string match in selection_cli_2.
Bypasses by using abbreviated parameter names (-s, -v, -p) instead of the full parameter names (-server=, -vkey=, -password=), which avoids matching the selection_cli_1 criteria.
